SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-14-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AHMAD MAHMOUD ABEDELAL IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED ARABIC INTERPRETER SAMMY ABEDELAL, SON OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT WANT A COURT INTERPRETER, PREFERS HIS SON WHO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. DEFENDANT JAQUAN PRINSHE PHILLIPS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF AHMAD MAHMOUD ABEDELAL IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED ARABIC INTERPRETER SAMI ABEDELAL, SON OF PLAINTIFF WHO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. DEFENDANT JAQUAN PRINSHE PHILLIPS IS NOT PRESENT. FINAL CONTINUANCE OF SEPTEMBER 9, 2022, COURT ORDERED CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE IF NO PROOF OF SERVICE IN DECEMBER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
